- [ ] 🐞 Bug fix

## How was this tested?

<!-- Simulator, real device, or both? Write "n/a" for docs / chore. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `xcodegen generate` runs and the scheme builds
- [ ] I reviewed my own diff
- [ ] No personal data or credentials in the diff

## If applicable

<!-- Delete any line that does not apply to this PR. -->

- [ ] New user-facing strings use `.loc` and the key was added to all 22 language files
- [ ] New files under `Zwaeg/` are picked up by `xcodegen generate` (never edit project.pbxproj by hand)
- [ ] UI change includes before / after screenshots
- [ ] User-facing change is reflected in `docs/`
